primary.$description: Primary interactive element color for CTAs, links, and key interactions - references system light theme

secondary.$description: Secondary interactive element color for less prominent interactions - references system light theme

success.$description: Color indicating successful state or positive feedback - references system light theme

error.$description: Color indicating error state or negative feedback - references system light theme

warning.$description: Color indicating warning state or caution - references system light theme

info.$description: Color indicating informational state or neutral message - references system light theme

default.$description: Default background color for main content areas - references system light theme

secondary.$description: Secondary background color for alternate sections - references system light theme

tertiary.$description: Tertiary background color for interactive elements

primary.$description: Primary text color for main content - references system light theme

secondary.$description: Secondary text color for supporting information - references system light theme
